Heraclius with Heraclius Constantine, and Heraclonas (AD 632-641). AV solidus (20mm, 4.44 gm, 7h). NGC Choice AU 5/5 - 2/5, graffito. Constantinople, 9th officina, dated Indictional Year 5 (AD 631/2). Heraclius (in center), with long beard and mustache, Heraclius Constantine (on right), beardless, and Heraclonas (on left), beardless, standing facing, each wearing chlamys and crown surmounted by cross, with globus cruciger in right hand / VICTORIA-AVϚЧ Θ, cross potent on three steps; c...
